title: Proclamation No. 21, s. 1962
text:
MALACAÑANG

RESIDENCE OF THE PRESIDENT OF THE PHILIPPINES MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 21

RESERVING FOR THE CITY OF MANILA GENERAL HOSPITAL SITE PURPOSES CERTAIN PARCELS OF THE PRIVATE AND PUBLIC DOMAIN OF THE NATIONAL GOVERNMENT IN EXCHANGE FOR CERTAIN PROPERTIES OF THE CITY OF MANILA TO BE CONVEYED TO THE NATIONAL GOVERNMENT FOR THE USE OF THE PHILIPPINE NAVY, SITUATED IN THE DISTRICT OF MALATE, CITY OF MANILA, ISLAND OF LUZON

WHEREAS, the National Government is the owner of lot 9-A, Psd-63126; lot 10-A, Psd-63125; lot 12-A, Psd-63125; lot 14-A, Psd-63125; lot ll-Swo-16762; lot 6-A, Psd-63125; and lot 13-A, Psd-63125 with an aggregate area of 14,241.80 square meters, all covered by TCT No, 60736, and Lot 101, Block 595, Psu-19119, with an area of 901.10 square meters, situated in the district of Malate, City of Manila;

WHEREAS, the City of Manila is, likewise the owner of certain parcels of land situated in the same district containing a total area of about 15,900 square meters, which are at present occupied by the Philippine Navy Headquarters, identified as portion of lot 1, Block 596, covered by TCT No. 3294; portion of lot 1, Block 372, covered by TCT No. 7701; portion of lot 5, Block 572, covered by TCT Nos. 934, 3502 and 32110; lot 29, Block 610, covered by TCT No. 39655; lot 30, Block 610, covered by TCT No. 6213; and tot 81, Block 610 (no title) ; portion of lot 32, Block 610 (no title) ; and portion of abandoned Calle M. H. del Pilar;

WHEREAS, the City of Manila has agreed to convey to the National Government its title to the lots mentioned in the preceding paragraph in consideration of the reservation of the parcels Of kind mentioned in the first paragraph hereof for/the use of the City of Manila for hospital site purposes;

NOW, THEREFORE, upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Natural Resources and pursuant to the powers vested in me by law, I, Diosdado Macapagal, President of the Philippines, do hereby withdraw from sale and settlement and reserve for the City of Manila General Hospital site purposes under the administration of the City of Manila, subject to private rights, if any there be, certain parcels of the private and public domain of the Government situated in the district of Malate, City of Manila, and more particularly described as follows, to wit:

Lot 9-A, Psd-63126

A parcel of land (Lot 9-A of the subdivision plan Psd-63126, being a portion of lot 9 of Plan Swo-16762, as shown on Plan J-10-16, Office of the City Engineer), situated in the District of Malate, City of Manila. Bounded on the NE., along line 1-2, by lot 9-B of the subdivision plan; on the SE., along lines 2-3-4-5-6 by lot 9-B of the subdivision plan; on the W., along line 6-7, by lot 1-A of the subdivision plan; and on the NW., along lines 7-8 and 8-1, by lot 1-A of the subdivision plan. Beginning at a point marked 1 on plan, being No. 13° 15′ E., 136.86 meters from F. Hyd. 559, City of Manila; thence S. 27° 16′ E., 32.93 meters to point 2; thence S. 37° 13′ W., 8.98 meters to point 3; thence S. 64° 49′ W., 14.58 meters to point 4; thence N. 65° 57′ W., 4.79 meters to point 5; thence S. 64° 46′ W., 21.80 meters to point 6; thence N. 12° 17′ E., 11.50 meters to point 7; thence N. 45° 59′ E., 6.95 meters to point 8; thence N. 30° 42′ E., 39.50 meters to the point of beginning; containing an area of 922.50. All points referred to are indicated on the plan and are marked on the ground as follows: point 1, by P. S. Cyl. Conc. Mon., 15 x 60 cm.; joints 2, 3, 4, 5 and 6, by G.I.S. on concrete bank of canal; and points 7 and 8, by old corners; bearings true; date of the original survey, October 7, 1912 to October 15, 1013, and that of the subdivision survey, August 28 and 29, 1961, which was approved on January 23, 1962.

Lot 10-A, Psd-63125 THE COMMONWEALTH OF THE PHILIPPINES

A parcel of land (Lot 10-A of the subdivision plan Psd-63125, being a portion of Lot 10 of plan Swo-16762, as shown on Plan F-9-35, Office of the City Engineer), situated in the District of Malate, City of Manila, Bounded on the NW., along line 1-2, by lot 10-B of the subdivision plan; on the NE. along line 2-3, by lot 12-A of the subdivision plan; on the S.E., along line 3-4, by lot 11 of plan Swo-16762; and on the SW., along line 4-5, by lot 2 of plan Ps-15527; and along lines 4-5-6 and 6-1, by lot 14-A of the subdivision plan. Beginning at a point marked 1 on plan, being N. 35° 18′ W., 233.27 meters, from P. Hyd. 559, City of Manila; thence N.66° 41′ E., 56.32 meters to point 2; thence S. 18° 02′ E., 46.43 meters to point 3; thence S. 38° 08′ W., 96.88 meters to point 4; thence N. 19° 44′ W., 81.86 meters to point 5; thence N. 69° 08′ E., 26.89 meters to point 6; thence N. 18° 14′ W., 12.03 meters to the point of beginning; containing an area of 5,425.70. All points referred to are indicated on the plan and are marked on the ground as follows: points 1 and 2, by P. S. Cyl. Conc. Mons 15 x 60 cm.; and points 3, 4, .5, and 6, by old B. L. Cone. Mons., 15 x 60 cm., bearings true; date of the original survey, October, 1912 to October 1913, and that of the subdivision survey, August 28 and 29, 1961, which was approved on January 23, 1962.

Lot 12-A, Psd-63125 THE COMMONWEALTH OF THE PHILIPPINES

A parcel of land (Lot 12-A of the subdivision plan Psd-63125, being a portion’ of Lot 12 of plan Swo-16762, as shown on Plan P-9-35, Office of the City Engineer), situated in the District of Malate, City of Manila. Bounded on the NW., along line 1-2, by lot 12-B of the subdivision plan; on the NE., along line 2-3, by Calle M. H. del Pilar (Abandoned); on the SE., along line 3-4, by Calle M. H. del Pilar (Abandoned); and on the SW., along line 4-1, by lot 10-A of the subdivision plan. Beginning at a point marked 1 on plan, being N. 21° 20′ W., 228.32 meters from P. Hyd. 559, City of Manila; thence N..66° 41′ E., 0.10 meters to point 2; thence S. 18° 00′ E., 46.37 meters to point 3; thence S. 38° 08′ W., 0.11 meters to point 4; thence N. 18° 02′ W., 46.43 meters to the point of beginning; containing an area of three square meters and nine square decimeters (3.90). All points referred to are indicated on the plan and are marked on the ground as follows: points 1 and 2, by P. S. Cyl. Conc. Mons., 15 x 60 cm.; and points 3 and 4, by old B. L. Cone. Mons., 15 x 60 cm.; bearings true; date of the original survey, October, 1912 to October, 1913, and that of the subdivision survey, August 28 and 29, 1961, which was approved on January 23, 1962.

Lot 14-A, Psd-63125 THE COMMONWEALTH OF THE PHILIPPINES

A parcel of land (Lot 14-A of the subdivision plan Psd-63125, being a portion of Lot 14 of plan Swo-16762, as shown on Plan P-9-35, Office of the City Engineer), situated in the District of Malate, City of Manila. Bounded on the NE., along line 1-2, by lot 10-A of -the subdivision; on the SE., along line 2-3, by lot 10-A of the subdivision plan; on the NE., along line 3-4, by lot 10-A of the subdivision plan; on the S., along line 4-5, by lot 2 of plan Ps-15527; on the SW., along line 5-6, by lot 14-B of the subdivision plan; and on the NW., along line 6-1, by lot 14-B of the subdivision plan. Beginning at a point marked 1 on plan, being N. 35° 18′ W., 233,27 meters from P. Hyd. 559, City of Manila: thence S. 18° 14′ E., 12.03 meters to point 2; thence S. 69° 08′ W., 26.89 meters to point 3; thence S. 19° 44′ E., 37.92 meters to point 4; thence N. 87′ 22′ W., 12.74 meters to point 5; thence N. 23° 17′ W., 43.11 meters to point 6; thence N. 66° 41′ E., 41.71 meters-to the point of beginning; containing an. area of nine hundred seven square meters and; eighty square decimeters (907.80.) All points referred to are indicated on the plan and are marked on the ground, as follows: points 1, 5 and 6, by P. S. Cyl. Conc. Mons., 15 x 60 cm.; and points 2, 3. and 4, by old B. L. Conc. Mons., 15 x 60 cm.; bearings true; date of the original survey, October, 1912 to October, 1913, and that of the subdivision survey, August 28 and 29, 1961, which was approved on January 23, ; 1962.

Lot 11, Swo-16762 THE COMMONWEALTH OF THE PHILIPPINES

Description of property of the Commonwealth of the Philippines, situated on Dewey Boulevard, District of Malate, to be reserved for the City of Manila, for the City General Hospital Site purposes.

Beginning at a point marked 1 on plan Swo-16762, N. 26° 33′ W., 86.22 meters from Fire Pug No. 558, City of Manila and N. 22° 10′ W., 181.96 meters more or less from Fire Plug No, 559, City of Manila; thence S. 38° 08′ W., 96.88 meters to point 2; thence S. 19° 44′ E., 47.23 meters to point 3; thence N. 38° 08′ E., 95.18 meters to point 4; thence N. 18° 02′ W., 48.15 meters to the point of beginning; containing an area of three thousand eight hundred forty square meters and forty square decimeters (3,840.40), more or less. All points referred to are indicated on the plan and are marked on the ground as follows: point 3, corner of landing; and the rest, are old B., L. Conc. Mons.: Bounded on the Northest, by Proposed Boulevard; on the Southeast, by Lot No. 6; on the Southwest, by Lot No. 2 of plan Psd-15527; and on the Northwest, by Lot No. 10.

Lot 6-A, Psd-63125 THE COMMONWEALTH OF THE PHILIPPINES

A parcel of land (Lot 6-A of the subdivision plan Psd-63125, being a portion of lot 6 of plan Swo-16762, as shown on Plan F-9-35, Office of the City Engineer), situated in the District of Malate, City of Manila. Bounded on the SW., along lines 1-2-3-4-5-6, by lot 2 of plan Ps-15527; on the NW, along line 6-7, by lot 11 of Plan Swo-16762; on the NE., along line 7-8, by lot 13-A of the subdivision plan; and on the SE., along lines 8-9 and 9-1 by lot 6-B’ of the subdivision plan. Beginning at a point marked 1 on plan, being N. 73° 55′ W., 110.68 meters from F. Hyd. 559, City of Manila; thence N. 19° 39′ W., 11.21 meters to point 2; thence N. 81° 23′ W., 4.47 meters to point 3; thence N. 32° 40′ W., 0.46 meters to point 4; thence N. 41° 22′ E., 4.57 meters to point 5; thence N. 19° 44′ W., 2.30 meters to point 6; thence N. 38° 08′ E., 95.18 meters to point 7; thence S. 18° 02′ E., 62.92 meters to point 8; thence N. 67° 10′ W., 2.75 meters to point 9; thence S. 64° 21′ W., 77.16 meters to the point of beginning; containing an area of three thousand one hundred thirty five square meters and sixty square decimeters (3,135.60). All points referred to are indicated on the plan and are marked on the ground as follows: points 1, 8 and 9, by P. S. Cyl. Conc. Mons., 15 x 60 cm.: and points 2, 3, 4, 5, 6 and 7, by old B. L. Cone. Mons., 15 x 60 cm.; bearings true; date of the original survey, October 1912 to October,. 1913, and that of the subdivision survey, August 28 and 29. 1961, which was approved on January 23, 1962.

Lot 13-A, Psd-63125 THE COMMONWEALTH OF THE PHILIPPINES

A parcel of land (Lot 13-A of the subdivision plan Psd-63125, being a portion of Lot 13 of plan Swo-16762, as shown on plan F-9-35, Office of the City Engineer), situated in the District of Malate, City of Manila, Bounded on the SW., along line 1-2, by lot 6-A of the subdivision plan on the NW., along line 2-3, by Galle M. H. del Pilar (Abandoned); on the NE., along line 3-4, by Galle M. H. del Pilar (Abandoned) ; and on the S., along line 4-1, by lot 13-B of the subdivision plan. Beginning at a point marked 1 on plan, being N. 28° 36′ W., 71.64 meters from F. Hyd. 559, City of Manila; thence N. 18° 02′ W., 62.92 meters to point 2; thence N. 38° 08′ E., 0.08 meters to point 3; thence S. 18° 00′ E., 62.98 meters to point 4; thence N. 71° 34′ W., 0.03 meters to the point of beginning; containing an area of two square meters and ninety square decimeters (2.90),. All points referred to are indicated on the plan and’ are marked on the ground as follows: points 1 and 4, by P. S. CyL Cone. Mons., 15 x 60 cm.; and points 2 and 3, by old B. L. Cone. Mons., 15 x 60 cm.; bearings true; date of the original survey, October, 1912 to October, 1913, and that of the subdivision survey, August 28 and 29, 1961, which was approved on January 23, 1962.

Lot 101, Block 595, Psu-191119 THE REPUBLIC OF THE PHILIPPINES

A parcel of land (Lot 101,-Block 595 of the cadastral survey of the City of Manila, G.L.R.O. Cadastral Record No. ‑‑‑‑‑ described on Bureau of Lands Plan Psu-191119, as shown on Plan F-9-36, Office of the City Engineer), situated in the District of Malate, City of Manila. Bounded on the N-, by lot 14-A of plan Psd-63125; on the NE., by lots 10-A and 6-A Of plan Psd-63125, and lot 11 of plan Swo-16762; on the SE., by property of the Republic of the Philippines; and on the SW., by Dewey Boulevard (45.00 M. Wide); Beginning at a point marked 1 on plan, being N. 73° 55′ W., 110.68 meters from F. Hyd. 559, City of Manila; thence S. 64° 21′ W., 4.67 meters to point 2; thence N. 23° 17′ W., 115.01 meters to point 3; thence S. 87° 22′ E., 12.74 meters to point 4; thence S. 19° 44′ E., 43.94 meters to point 5; thence S. 19° 44′ E., 4’7.23 meters to point 6; thence S. 19° 44′ E., 2.30 meters to point 7; thence S. 41° 22′ W., 4.57 meters to point 8; thence S. 32° 40′ E., 0.46 meters to point 9; thence S. 81° 23′ E., 4.47 meters to point 10; thence S. 19° 39′ E., 11.21 meters to the point of beginning; containing an area of nine hundred one square meters and ten square decimeters (901.10). All points referred to are indicated on the plan, and are marked on the ground as follows: points 1, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9 and 10, by old B. L. Cyl. Conc. Mons., 15 x 60 cm.; and points 2 and 3, by P. S. Cyl. Conc. Mons. 15 x 60 cm., bearing true; date of survey, August 28 and 29, 1961, which Was approved on January 26, 1962.

Upon the reservation of the parcels of land mentioned in the first paragraph hereof, the City of Manila shall execute the necessary deed of conveyance of its parcels of land mentioned in the second paragraph to the National Government which shall be reserved for the use of the Philippine Navy.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 11th day of April, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and sixty-two, and of the Independence of the Philippines, the sixteenth.

DIOSDADO MACAPAGAL President of the Philippines

By the President:

AMELITO R. MUTUC Executive Secretary

Source: University Library, Far Eastern University
